knowledge.html:
XIII. QUANTIFIERS (LUONG TU)

Cach dungMANYMUCH
Dien dat y nghia la "NHIEU"MANY = a large number of / a great many / a majority of / a wide variety of / a wide range of
- Dung voi danh tu dem duoc.		MUCH = a great deal of / a large amount of...
- Dung voi danh tu khong dem duoc.
MANY + MUCH = A lot of / lots of / plenty of / a (large) quantity of
(Dung voi ca danh tu ca dem duoc va khong dem duoc).
Y nghiaDem duocKhong dem duoc
"MOT IT"A FEW - Dung voi danh tu dem duoc.A LITTLE - Dung voi danh tu khong dem duoc.
"HAU NHU KHONG / RAT IT"FEW - Dung voi danh tu dem duoc.LITTLE - Dung voi danh tu khong dem duoc.
Y nghiaCach dung
"MOT VAI" - SOMEDung trong cau khang dinh va trong cau nghi van khi mang y moi/de nghi.
"BAT CU" - ANYDung trong cau phu dinh, nghi van va dung trong cau khang dinh khi no mang y nghia la "bat cu".
"TAT CA" - ALLDung de chi tu ba nguoi/vat (tat ca) tro len.
"CA HAI" - BOTHDung de chi ca hai nguoi/vat (ca hai).
"KHONG" - NONEDung de chi tu ba nguoi/vat tro len deu khong.
"KHONG" - NEITHER/EITHERDung de chi ca hai nguoi/vat deu khong.
+ Neither: dung trong cau khang dinh.
+ Either: dung trong cau phu dinh.
"HAU HET" - MOSTMost + N = most of + the/tinh tu so huu + N

Luu y: MOSTLY (chu yeu la): dung nhu mot trang tu. ALMOST (gan nhu): dung nhu mot trang tu bo tro cho dong tu, tinh tu, danh tu.

Y nghiaEACHEVERY
"MOI/MOI"EACH/EVERY: dung voi danh tu dem duoc so it.
Dung voi danh tu so nhieu khi co so luong cu the.
Y nghiaOTHERANOTHER
"CAI KHAC/NGUOI KHAC"- Other + danh tu khong dem duoc.
- Other + danh tu so nhieu.
- Other + ones.
- Others duoc su dung nhu dai tu.		- Another + danh tu so it.
- Another + one.
- Another + so dem + danh tu so nhieu.
- Another duoc su dung nhu dai tu.

Su khac nhau giua THE OTHER - THE OTHERS:

  • The other: cai con lai trong hai cai, hoac nguoi con lai trong hai nguoi.
  • The others: nhung cai con lai hoac nhung nguoi con lai trong mot nhom co nhieu thu hoac nhieu nguoi.

exercises.question: Andy spent _____ money at the supermarket.
exercises.explanation: 'money' la danh tu khong dem duoc. 'a lot of' dung duoc voi ca dem duoc va khong dem duoc.

exercises.question: There are _____ organizations to help the deaf and the blind.
exercises.explanation: 'organizations' la danh tu dem duoc so nhieu => 'many'.

exercises.question: I'm very busy at the moment so it may take a _____ time to answer your letters.
exercises.explanation: 'time' la danh tu khong dem duoc => 'a little' (mot it).

exercises.question: Very _____ people knew about the truth of the scandal.
exercises.explanation: 'Very few' = rat it (mang nghia phu dinh). 'people' la dem duoc => 'few'.

exercises.question: Thank you for bringing me along. I never thought the trip could be so _____ fun.
exercises.explanation: 'fun' la danh tu khong dem duoc => 'much'. 'so much fun' = vui den the.

exercises.question: The accident looked serious but fortunately _____ people were injured.
exercises.explanation: 'fortunately' (may man) + it nguoi bi thuong => 'few' (rat it, mang y tich cuc khi di voi fortunately).

exercises.question: We didn't take _____ photographs when we were on holiday.
exercises.explanation: 'photographs' la dem duoc. Trong cau phu dinh, 'a lot of' van dung duoc. 'many of' can co 'the' phia sau.

exercises.question: _____ the students in my class enjoy taking part in social activities.
exercises.explanation: 'the students' co mao tu 'the' => dung 'Most of the students'.

exercises.question: He's always busy. He has _____ time to relax.
exercises.explanation: Luon ban => hau nhu khong co thoi gian => 'little' (rat it, mang nghia phu dinh).

exercises.question: She put so _____ salt in the soup that she couldn't have it. It was too salty.
exercises.explanation: 'salt' la khong dem duoc + 'so...that' => 'so much salt that'.

exercises.question: We had a boring holiday. _____ the time we lay on the beach.
exercises.explanation: 'the time' co mao tu => 'Most of the time'.

exercises.question: How _____ students are there in your class?
exercises.explanation: 'students' la dem duoc => 'How many'.

exercises.question: I feel sorry for her. She has _____ friends.
exercises.explanation: 'feel sorry' => thuong co ay vi co rat it ban => 'few' (phu dinh).

exercises.question: I spent _____ my spare time gardening last year.
exercises.explanation: 'my spare time' co tinh tu so huu => 'most of my spare time'.

exercises.question: He doesn't have so _____ friends as I think.
exercises.explanation: 'friends' la dem duoc + 'so...as' => 'so many friends as'.

exercises.question: With only _____ hope, Harry didn't know how to keep going another day.
exercises.explanation: 'hope' la khong dem duoc + 'didn't know how to keep going' (tieu cuc) => 'little' (hau nhu khong).

exercises.question: How _____ money have you got?
exercises.explanation: 'money' la khong dem duoc => 'How much'.

exercises.question: She has a lot of books, but only _____ books are interesting.
exercises.explanation: 'books' la dem duoc + 'only' + nghia tich cuc (interesting) => 'a few'.

exercises.question: He never spends too _____ money on his vacation.
exercises.explanation: 'money' la khong dem duoc => 'too much money'.

exercises.question: _____ Indian men agreed that it was unwise to confide in their wives.
exercises.explanation: 'Indian men' la dem duoc so nhieu => 'Many'.
